signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your Hilads account

signUp.title: Join Hilads
signUp.subtitle: Your guest activity will be carried over.
signUp.errMode: Please choose a mode to continue
signUp.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
signUp.errEula: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for this email, we've sent a reset link. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

eula.zeroTolerance: Hilads has zero tolerance for objectionable content or abusive behavior. Violations may result in immediate account termination.
eula.links: Read our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
eula.agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
eula.modalSub: Hilads' Terms of Service and Community Guidelines have been updated. Please review and accept to continue.
